== Notes for [[Item:Q103518|Q103518]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-4930635/search/0/Alonso+de+lerma

http://dbe.rah.es/biografias/51297/francisco-lerma

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076929582346

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
